title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 55: Sage Attention, Wan Fusion X, Wan 2.2 & Video Upscale Tips
description:
ComfyUI Tutorial Ep 55 covers everything you need to know about setting up Sage Attention v2, using Wan Fusion X for faster video generation, upscaling videos efficiently, and testing the new Wan 2.2 model. Whether you're optimizing ComfyUI performance or fine-tuning video workflows, this episode is packed with practical tips and tools.

✅ What You'll Learn:
- How to install Sage Attention v2 with an easy installer
- Speed comparison of Sage Attention vs default setup
- How to generate videos with Wan Fusion X + Lora
- Upscaling techniques using 2x and 4x models (image and video)
- Testing quick the Wan 2.2 model

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
Step 1: use this link to join if you didn't join already https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3
Step 2: access directly this episode using this link: https://discord.com/channels/1245221993746399232/1399764462126239927/1399765423712505927

Link to easy installer https://github.com/Tavris1/ComfyUI-Easy-Install

Check Other Episod
